executive_summary: Build workflow failed due to missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404, indicating the workflow configuration is not properly set up in the repository. This requires adding the workflow YAML file to .github/workflows/ directory.

errors.message: Workflow file not found - HTTP 404 on workflow dispatch endpoint
errors.root_cause: The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) does not exist in the repository or the GitHub token lacks workflow/actions permissions. The workflow dispatch API endpoint returned 404 Not Found.
errors.fix_recommendation: Create .github/workflows/build.yml with proper Maven build configuration, or verify that the workflow file exists and the GitHub token has 'workflow' and 'actions:write' permissions enabled.
